name: s3-voice-escalation
description: Design spike S3 — Voice Escalation Loop. Standalone, runnable prototype of the platform-owned escalation-ladder state machine with simulated chat/push/sms/voice channels, a Twilio-shaped outbound-call + DTMF-ack simulation, virtual-time rung timeouts, and a PIN-no-persist DTMF webhook handler. Vendors are interchangeable delivery channels; ladder state is the single source of truth.
